programme.title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban (2004)
programme.desc: The teenage wizard is alarmed to learn a dangerous fugitive sorcerer is searching for him. Meanwhile, a new teacher at Hogwarts helps the bespectacled youngster to protect himself from the school's soul-sucking security guards. The third in the fantasy adventure series, starring Daniel Radcliffe, Emma Watson, Rupert Grint, Gary Oldman, David Thewlis, Michael Gambon, Robbie Coltrane and Alan Rickman

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: The latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban (2004)
programme.desc: The teenage wizard is alarmed to learn a dangerous fugitive sorcerer is searching for him. Meanwhile, a new teacher at Hogwarts helps the bespectacled youngster to protect himself from the school's soul-sucking security guards. The third in the fantasy adventure series, starring Daniel Radcliffe, Emma Watson, Rupert Grint, Gary Oldman, David Thewlis, Michael Gambon, Robbie Coltrane and Alan Rickman

programme.title: Wonder Woman (2017)
programme.desc: An Amazon princess has her first encounter with the outside world during the First World War, when an American airman crash lands on her isolated island home. Determined to bring the chaos sweeping the world to an end, she ventures onto the front line in the war to end all wars to bring down an ancient and powerful evil force that is driving the human race towards destruction. Superhero fantasy adventure, starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine and David Thewlis

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: The latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Wonder Woman (2017)
programme.desc: An Amazon princess has her first encounter with the outside world during the First World War, when an American airman crash lands on her isolated island home. Determined to bring the chaos sweeping the world to an end, she ventures onto the front line in the war to end all wars to bring down an ancient and powerful evil force that is driving the human race towards destruction. Superhero fantasy adventure, starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine and David Thewlis

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter loses his job and decides to pursue his lifelong dream of becoming a knight at a travelling Renaissance fair. Unfortunately, he finds himself locked in a tournament with the resident jousting champion. With the guest voice of Will Ferrell

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter learns his house on Spooner Street is not officially a part of the United States, and decides to take drastic action - by establishing his own country and declaring war on America

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter tries to help Meg in her bid to become a reporter for the school newspaper by writing an article falsely claiming actor Luke Perry, who guest stars as himself, is gay. Meanwhile, Stewie builds a device that brings Chris under his power. Animated comedy, with the voices of Seth MacFarlane and Mila Kunis

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Stan finds out his half-brother Rusty (guest voice Lou Diamond Phillips) is wealthier than him when the family gathers for Thanksgiving, and takes extreme measures to recover what he thinks is rightfully his

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Francine falls in with a group of tough girls after becoming the new school guidance counsellor. Jeff panics when he loses his hat

programme.title: The Stand Up Sketch Show
programme.desc: Luke Kempner, Rachel Jackson, Russell Kane, Dane Baptiste, Luke McQueen, Steen Raskopoulos, Lily Phillips and Tom Parry routines are reconstructed as sketches

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Marcus and Grumio are thrown into turmoil by the sudden departure of Stylax and the arrival of builder Jason. Return of the comedy, with Tom Rosenthal and Ryan Sampson

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: The boys' bar receives a devastating review from the leading food critic in Rome, so Grumio invites her back for a rematch with his experimental new menu. With Annette Badland

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The remaining cooks celebrate their success of making it to the final five. Cody and Mary Lou, who have a budding romance, decide to take their celebration to the hot tub

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jim and Gary remove the Duckworths' new staircase until they get paid. Jack enjoys having Vera stuck upstairs. Hayley thanks Alma for standing up for her

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Nick and Leanne feel guilty as they leave for Scotland. Alma grows tired of Hayley following her around. Vera gives Jim and Gary a cheque and they replace the staircase

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Roy is over the moon after his night with Kelly. Eric starts his first day as estate manager. Mandy and Tricia discover Bernice has been lying about her age

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: No one can believe Kelly is serious about Roy. Donna goes back to school and Andy is bullied by his new classmates. Zak and Lisa are at each other's throats

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: An attempted murder leads Nick to uncover a local landowner's shady past, while reports of illegal boxing bouts keep his fellow coppers on their toes. Meanwhile, Kate discusses the reason for Alex Ferrenby's increasingly erratic behaviour

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Jean informs Sid she wants a lover to bring a bit of spice back into her life. Comedy, starring Diana Coupland and Sid James

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Jack and Stan volunteer Olive as supervisor for the depot nursery. However, when she breaks her glasses and has to go home for a spare pair the clueless duo are left holding the fort. Comedy, starring Reg Varney, Bob Grant and Anna Karen

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan believes living at home is cramping his style and resolves to find his own place. Vintage comedy with Reg Varney and Bob Grant

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuthing spinster is invited to the wedding of her former housemaid Gwenda, only to be caught up in a murder mystery involving the groom's family. Geraldine McEwan stars, with Juliet Stevenson, Denis Lawson and Alison Steadman

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A relative brings important news, and Nick is puzzled when Kate seems less than pleased to see her. Meanwhile, a wedding is thrown into confusion by a family death. Rural police drama, starring Nick Berry and Niamh Cusack

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zak finally agrees to a church do for Belle. Scott presses Mandy for info about Kelly and Roy. Bernice confesses all her plans to Mandy and Tricia

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zak is not pleased that the rest of the Dingles want Paddy as godfather. Roy plans to propose to Kelly. Donna and Andy make up at school

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Nick is frustrated by Gail's dislike of Leanne. Hayley is thrilled when Alma invites her to her home. Leanne urges Nick to tell Gail they are married

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Leanne assures Nick that she does not regret marrying him. Curly learns that Hayley's father has died. Des is startled when Samantha packs her bags

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford detective gains a taste of prison life while investigating the murder of an inmate jailed for a property swindle. The victim's two partners-in-crime are also incarcerated in the same low-security cell block. Morse is determined to find out whether they know anything about the killing, but has to avoid offending the prison authorities while also dealing with a brash subordinate. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with guest appearances by Sean Bean, Richard Wilson, Jim Broadbent, Diana Quick and Steven Mackintosh

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A gathering at the Devon estate of Miss Marple's old school friend Lady Tressilian leads to murder when the eccentric Mr Treves tells the story of an unconvicted child killer. Miss Marple is on hand to assist Supt Mallard of the local constabulary, but not before a second victim is claimed. Mystery, starring Geraldine McEwan, with guest appearances by Eileen Atkins, Tom Baker, Paul Nicholls, Alan Davies and Greg Wise, with a cameo by former British number-one tennis player Greg Rusedski

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The last run of the detective drama ended with Lewis (Kevin Whately) starting a new life away from the force, but it seems that peace and quiet doesn't suit him - which is just as well, as newly promoted DI Hathaway (Laurence Fox) is struggling to find a sidekick, and within just four weeks is already on to his second sergeant, DS Lizzie Maddox (Angela Griffin). So, Chief Superintendent Innocent (Rebecca Front) decides to reunite the former partners to look into the murder of a neurosurgeon, a case with potential links to the worlds of animal rights and blood sports. In the first of this two-part story, suspicion falls on glamorous widow Erica (Kara Tointon), but it turns out there are plenty of other people in the victim's inner circle who were driven by fear and loathing

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Brooks and Devlin investigate when the body of missing 10-year-old Jodie Gaines is found in a skip. The pair immediately identify two main suspects - a taxi driver who claims to have dropped the girl off at her guitar lesson, and the teacher who swears she never arrived. The case then takes an unexpected turn, leaving Steel and Phillips with the toughest choices of their careers. Dervla Kirwan guest stars, alongside Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber and Freema Agyeman

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: The discovery of slaves on the Pritchard farm has turned a murder inquiry into a multi-agency operation. The enormity of the case brings Dodson to Syndicate 9, keen to establish Gill's state of mind and efficacy as senior officer. Having been the driver involved in the fatal collision with Cal Pritchard, Janet is under investigation and unable to interview the man's widow Evie. Devastated by the consequences of her actions, the detective eventually finds solace in Chris's calm and kind reasoning, but when an incandescent Evie smells alcohol on Gill's breath, she has all the ammunition she needs to discredit the case and bring the DCI down

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford detective gains a taste of prison life while investigating the murder of an inmate jailed for a property swindle. The victim's two partners-in-crime are also incarcerated in the same low-security cell block. Morse is determined to find out whether they know anything about the killing, but has to avoid offending the prison authorities while also dealing with a brash subordinate. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with guest appearances by Sean Bean, Richard Wilson, Jim Broadbent, Diana Quick and Steven Mackintosh

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid dodges a stage performance, only to end up sorting out props and scenery. Classic comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: One of Stan's colleagues is about to marry the Inspector's niece - but first he has to survive the stag night. Vintage comedy, starring Reg Varney

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: The Annual Busmen's Ball arrives, and Jack arranges a stripper as part of the entertainment. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Bob Grant

programme.title: Carry On Cowboy (1966)
programme.desc: Notorious outlaw the Rumpo Kid runs riot in lawless Stodge City. A local judge sends for someone to clean up the town - a summons taken literally by a timid English sanitation expert who becomes the new sheriff. Comedy Western, starring Jim Dale, Sid James, Charles Hawtrey, Kenneth Williams, Bernard Bresslaw and Joan Sims

programme.title: Carry On Doctor (1967)
programme.desc: A popular doctor is sacked after a misunderstanding ruins his reputation, prompting the furious patients to stage a revolt against the luckless medic's strait-laced superiors. Meanwhile, the hospital head has his own problems after becoming the unlikely romantic target of a strict matron. Comedy, with Frankie Howerd, Jim Dale, Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey and Hattie Jacques

programme.title: Carry On Matron (1972)
programme.desc: A wily thief gathers a band of crooks for a plot to break into a maternity hospital and steal the supply of contraceptive pills. One of the gang gets the lie of the land by disguising himself as a nurse, but the hypochondriac head doctor and formidable matron prove constant obstacles to the heist. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams and Hattie Jacques

programme.title: Carry On Cruising (1962)
programme.desc: The captain of a cruise ship bound for the Mediterranean is less than impressed when five of his regular shipmates are replaced at the last minute. Despite their best efforts to earn his respect and an eagerness to please, the new recruits seem doomed to cause chaos whatever they do. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Liz Fraser and Kenneth Connor

programme.title: Carry On Behind (1975)
programme.desc: Professors Ronald Crump and Anna Vooshka embark on an archaeological dig, but find their efforts disrupted by the saucy shenanigans of a motley bunch of holiday-makers in the neighbouring caravan park. Comedy, starring Kenneth Williams, Elke Sommer, Joan Sims, Windsor Davies, Kenneth Connor and Bernard Bresslaw

programme.title: Carry On Screaming (1966)
programme.desc: A sinister boffin, his sultry sister and two genetic misfits kidnap innocent women from spooky Hocomb Woods and turn them into mannequins - but two dim-witted detectives look set to throw a spanner in the works. Comedy horror, starring Kenneth Williams, Fenella Fielding, Harry H Corbett, Charles Hawtrey, Jim Dale, Joan Sims and Bernard Bresslaw

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Brooks, Devlin and Chandler investigate after a man is found badly beaten in a park. They discover the victim, Roland Kirk - who lives in a nearby camper van - had many enemies in the community, but nobody is willing to talk. The case then takes a decisive turn when a local man capitulates after being arrested and points the finger at architect Harry Morgan, whose son had recently turned against him and aligned himself with Kirk. Kevin McNally guest stars, with Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber and Harriet Walter

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: On doctor's orders, the dapper Belgian sleuth visits Brighton for what he hopes will be a relaxing holiday, but it leads to one of the most absorbing cases he has ever faced - the disappearance of a cache of jewels. Mystery, starring David Suchet, with Hermione Norris, Philip Jackson and Sorcha Cusack

programme.title: The Danish Girl (2015)
programme.desc: Artist Gerda Wegener unveils a portrait of her husband Einar dressed as a woman in 1920s Copenhagen. Einar realises that the woman in the painting is his true identity, and decides to become one of the first people to undergo sex reassignment surgery. Period drama based on David Ebershoff's novel inspired by the true story of artist Lili Elbe, starring Eddie Redmayne and an Oscar-winning Alicia Vikander

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan's plans for a romantic day at home are thwarted by Arthur's ramshackle motorbike, which unexpectedly breaks down on him. Comedy, with Reg Varney

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street

programme.title: Bugsy Malone (1976)
programme.desc: Alan Parker's slapstick musical comedy, featuring a cast composed entirely of children and following a war between rival gangsters in 1920s New York - fought with custard pies and cream-firing Tommy guns. When a slick mobster acquires devastating new weapons, his arch rival enlists the aid of a small-time chancer to steal them. Starring Scott Baio, Florrie Dugger and John Cassisi, with Jodie Foster in an early appearance

programme.title: Carry On Loving (1970)
programme.desc: A couple who run a dating agency find themselves inundated with customers, and end up arranging a selection of very unlikely matches - while also contending with their own marital difficulties. Comedy, starring Sid James, Hattie Jacques, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey, Bernard Bresslaw, Joan Sims and Terry Scott

programme.title: Carry On Girls (1973)
programme.desc: The council of a seaside town is in dire need of a means to attract tourists to its resort, so announces a beauty contest. While the conniving organiser plots a series of publicity stunts, an outraged feminist group plans to sabotage the event. Comedy, starring Sid James, June Whitfield, Joan Sims, Barbara Windsor, Bernard Bresslaw and Peter Butterworth

programme.title: Carry On Doctor (1967)
programme.desc: A popular doctor is sacked after a misunderstanding ruins his reputation, prompting the furious patients to stage a revolt against the luckless medic's strait-laced superiors. Meanwhile, the hospital head has his own problems after becoming the unlikely romantic target of a strict matron. Comedy, with Frankie Howerd, Jim Dale, Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey and Hattie Jacques

programme.title: Carry On Cleo (1964)
programme.desc: A captured Briton is mistaken for a heroic swordsman and promoted to the Roman Royal Guard, with orders to protect Julius Caesar. But the last thing he and the fated emperor expect is an assassination attempt from within Caesar's own circle of friends. Comedy, starring Amanda Barrie, Kenneth Williams, Sid James, Kenneth Connor, Jim Dale, Charles Hawtrey and Joan Sims

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Captain Hastings is staying with friends when wealthy heiress Mrs Inglethorp is murdered. He calls in Hercule Poirot to help him solve the baffling crime, which has the whole household under suspicion. Whodunit, starring David Suchet as the Belgian sleuth, with Hugh Fraser, Pauline Moran, Anthony Calf and Philip Jackson

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A planning dispute leads to murder after a stalwart in the Midsomer Conservation Society suspects her neighbours are involved in a money-making development scam. Political wrangling, burglaries and sexual liaisons abound in picturesque Great Pelfe as Barnaby and Jones investigate. Guest starring Hugo Speer (Bleak House), with John Nettles, Jason Hughes and Jane Wymark

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: A housewife found choked to death in her own home marks the third strangulation in a month, setting Oxford police on edge. As a manhunt begins in search of a murderer targeting married women, Endeavour looks into the origin of the silk stocking used to kill the latest victim, tracing the garment to its sole supplier in the city. However, as the suspect list narrows and the culprit stalks his prey with increasing desperation, Morse and Thursday find their private lives turned upside down and miss a deeper tragedy unfolding

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: An arson attack on a Turkish social club leaves 17 people dead and Brooks, Devlin and Chandler fearing the crime was racially motivated. They uncover a trail of false identities, but face opposition from a respected barrister when they need to remove a key piece of evidence from a suspect's leg. Meanwhile, Steel is forced to confront one of his oldest friends. Guest starring Charles Kay, with Bradley Walsh and Jamie Bamber

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Brooks, Devlin and Chandler investigate after a man is found badly beaten in a park. They discover the victim, Roland Kirk - who lives in a nearby camper van - had many enemies in the community, but nobody is willing to talk. The case then takes a decisive turn when a local man capitulates after being arrested and points the finger at architect Harry Morgan, whose son had recently turned against him and aligned himself with Kirk. Kevin McNally guest stars, with Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber and Harriet Walter

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: On doctor's orders, the dapper Belgian sleuth visits Brighton for what he hopes will be a relaxing holiday, but it leads to one of the most absorbing cases he has ever faced - the disappearance of a cache of jewels. Mystery, starring David Suchet, with Hermione Norris, Philip Jackson and Sorcha Cusack

programme.title: The Danish Girl (2015)
programme.desc: Artist Gerda Wegener unveils a portrait of her husband Einar dressed as a woman in 1920s Copenhagen. Einar realises that the woman in the painting is his true identity, and decides to become one of the first people to undergo sex reassignment surgery. Period drama based on David Ebershoff's novel inspired by the true story of artist Lili Elbe, starring Eddie Redmayne and an Oscar-winning Alicia Vikander

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan's plans for a romantic day at home are thwarted by Arthur's ramshackle motorbike, which unexpectedly breaks down on him. Comedy, with Reg Varney

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street

programme.title: Bugsy Malone (1976)
programme.desc: Alan Parker's slapstick musical comedy, featuring a cast composed entirely of children and following a war between rival gangsters in 1920s New York - fought with custard pies and cream-firing Tommy guns. When a slick mobster acquires devastating new weapons, his arch rival enlists the aid of a small-time chancer to steal them. Starring Scott Baio, Florrie Dugger and John Cassisi, with Jodie Foster in an early appearance

programme.title: Carry On Loving (1970)
programme.desc: A couple who run a dating agency find themselves inundated with customers, and end up arranging a selection of very unlikely matches - while also contending with their own marital difficulties. Comedy, starring Sid James, Hattie Jacques, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey, Bernard Bresslaw, Joan Sims and Terry Scott

programme.title: Carry On Girls (1973)
programme.desc: The council of a seaside town is in dire need of a means to attract tourists to its resort, so announces a beauty contest. While the conniving organiser plots a series of publicity stunts, an outraged feminist group plans to sabotage the event. Comedy, starring Sid James, June Whitfield, Joan Sims, Barbara Windsor, Bernard Bresslaw and Peter Butterworth

programme.title: Carry On Doctor (1967)
programme.desc: A popular doctor is sacked after a misunderstanding ruins his reputation, prompting the furious patients to stage a revolt against the luckless medic's strait-laced superiors. Meanwhile, the hospital head has his own problems after becoming the unlikely romantic target of a strict matron. Comedy, with Frankie Howerd, Jim Dale, Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey and Hattie Jacques

programme.title: Carry On Cleo (1964)
programme.desc: A captured Briton is mistaken for a heroic swordsman and promoted to the Roman Royal Guard, with orders to protect Julius Caesar. But the last thing he and the fated emperor expect is an assassination attempt from within Caesar's own circle of friends. Comedy, starring Amanda Barrie, Kenneth Williams, Sid James, Kenneth Connor, Jim Dale, Charles Hawtrey and Joan Sims

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Captain Hastings is staying with friends when wealthy heiress Mrs Inglethorp is murdered. He calls in Hercule Poirot to help him solve the baffling crime, which has the whole household under suspicion. Whodunit, starring David Suchet as the Belgian sleuth, with Hugh Fraser, Pauline Moran, Anthony Calf and Philip Jackson

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A planning dispute leads to murder after a stalwart in the Midsomer Conservation Society suspects her neighbours are involved in a money-making development scam. Political wrangling, burglaries and sexual liaisons abound in picturesque Great Pelfe as Barnaby and Jones investigate. Guest starring Hugo Speer (Bleak House), with John Nettles, Jason Hughes and Jane Wymark

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: A housewife found choked to death in her own home marks the third strangulation in a month, setting Oxford police on edge. As a manhunt begins in search of a murderer targeting married women, Endeavour looks into the origin of the silk stocking used to kill the latest victim, tracing the garment to its sole supplier in the city. However, as the suspect list narrows and the culprit stalks his prey with increasing desperation, Morse and Thursday find their private lives turned upside down and miss a deeper tragedy unfolding

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: An arson attack on a Turkish social club leaves 17 people dead and Brooks, Devlin and Chandler fearing the crime was racially motivated. They uncover a trail of false identities, but face opposition from a respected barrister when they need to remove a key piece of evidence from a suspect's leg. Meanwhile, Steel is forced to confront one of his oldest friends. Guest starring Charles Kay, with Bradley Walsh and Jamie Bamber

programme.desc: Glover hides from a vengeful Greek by having his head wrapped in bandages. Hospital comedy, starring Peter Bowles

programme.desc: Robin saves a witch's life and accepts Marion fully into the band of outlaws. Fantasy drama, starring Michael Praed

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A villain comes out of hiding in an attempt to retrieve stolen loot and only Regan and Carter can stop him. Police drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur is asked for protection by newsagent Mr Mukerjee, who has been sent death threats and had a brick thrown through his window. When Terry goes along, he discovers that the problem may be that the shopowner has promised his daughter's hand in marriage to more than one man. Guest starring Saeed Jaffrey

programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle suspect Russian intervention when a mentally unstable lieutenant colonel holding valuable Nato secrets disappears from an army psychiatric hospital. Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson star

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: A woman is tormented by calls from her supposedly deceased husband, whose lifeless body was pulled from the sea several weeks earlier. While she is admitted to a sanatorium to prevent a nervous breakdown, Templar works on the premise that her spouse may indeed still be alive. Roger Moore and Sylvia Syms star

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: In order to investigate a villain's idea of the perfect crime, Harriet poses as a prostitute and Jim goes up in the world. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Doyle and Bodie pose as hitmen to infiltrate a mysterious group of hire killers whose targets are all retired government officials, and supposedly no longer of any strategic importance. Adventure, with Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: On Her Majesty's Secret Service (1969)
programme.desc: While on leave, James Bond prevents a young woman - Teresa 'Tracy' Draco - from committing suicide. Her father is Marc-Ange Draco, the head of a powerful crime syndicate who is impressed by Bond and wants him to protect his daughter by marrying her. In exchange, he offers Bond information that will lead him to master criminal and arch-enemy Ernst Stavro Blofeld, who is intent on destroying world peace by means of a lethal virus unless he receives an international amnesty for his crimes. Spy adventure, starring George Lazenby in his only outing as 007, alongside Telly Savalas, Diana Rigg, Gabrielle Ferzetti and Bernard Lee

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at Soreen, and how a Birmingham firm makes the ear-splitting whistles that have featured in world events for 150 years. programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Discover how traditional Cornish pasties are made on a massive scale, thanks to a team of world class bakers, go behind the scenes at the family firm making top-notch umbrellas for the great and the good, see how vintage style jukeboxes are made with some cutting-edge technology, and learn the secrets of a company whose carpets are laid around the world, from pubs to palaces

programme.title: Robin Hood (2010)
programme.desc: An archer fighting in Richard the Lionheart's crusading army returns home to England and assumes the identity of a nobleman killed in battle. His new-found status draws him into a dangerous conflict with members of the newly crowned King John's court, and a traitorous knight plots to aid the French in conquering England. Ridley Scott's medieval adventure, starring Russell Crowe, Cate Blanchett and Mark Strong

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Francesca Cumani introduces live coverage from Lingfield Park and Newcastle, featuring a total of 10 races on the all-weather surfaces. The feature race from Newcastle is the Burradon Stakes. With analysis from Luke Harvey and Adele Mulrennan, betting news from Matt Chapman, commentary from Mark Johnson and reports from Rishi Persad

programme.title: Kelly's Heroes (1970)
programme.desc: A rebellious American soldier fighting in occupied France learns from a captive German officer the whereabouts of a fortune in Nazi gold. Recruiting the aid of three fellow soldiers, he puts together a daring plan to penetrate enemy lines to get their hands on the bullion. Second World War adventure, starring Clint Eastwood, Telly Savalas, Donald Sutherland, Don Rickles and Harry Dean Stanton

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: Newly promoted Captain Horatio Hornblower sets out to make his mark on the world, and soon manages to capture his first enemy vessel - only to discover a peace treaty has been signed, leaving him down and out, with barely a penny to his name. Fate seems to smile on the ambitious seafarer though, when he discovers the villainous Bonaparte has reneged on the treaty. Drama based on the CS Forester novels, starring Ioan Gruffudd, Robert Lindsay, Paul McGann, Greg Wise, Lorcan Cranitch and Julia Sawalha

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: At the start of a busy Easter weekend of racing, Matt Chapman and the team look ahead to the best racing of the day. Plus, all the news leading up to next week's Grand National

Western, starring John Wayne, Kirk Douglas, Bruce Cabot and Howard Keel

programme.title: The Gauntlet (1977)
programme.desc: A downbeat cop sets out to escort a prostitute across America so she can give evidence in a high-profile Mob trial. However, corrupt officials are bent on ensuring the witness never makes it to court, and subject the pair to a series of attacks. Meanwhile, the mismatched duo's bid to reach their destination alive is complicated by a burgeoning romance. Action adventure, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With Sondra Locke, Bill McKinney and Pat Hingle

programme.desc: A woman is tormented by calls from her supposedly deceased husband, whose lifeless body was pulled from the sea several weeks earlier. While she is admitted to a sanatorium to prevent a nervous breakdown, Templar works on the premise that her spouse may indeed still be alive. Roger Moore and Sylvia Syms star

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: In order to investigate a villain's idea of the perfect crime, Harriet poses as a prostitute and Jim goes up in the world. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The Flying Squad is called in to catch a gunman who has stolen cash from a lock-up. Hard-hitting detective drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur's minicab firm is targeted by saboteurs. However, his partner in the venture is reluctant to involve the police, so he drafts in Terry to act as a driver and help identify the culprits. Needless to say, it soon transpires there is more to the attacks than meets the eye. George Cole, Alfred Burke and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Doyle and Bodie pose as hitmen to infiltrate a mysterious group of hire killers whose targets are all retired government officials, and supposedly no longer of any strategic importance. Adventure, with Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: A lovelorn, smooth-talking minstrel turns to Robin and his outlaw band for help in rescuing his beloved from the Sheriff of Nottingham's clutches. Michael Praed stars

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Francesca Cumani introduces live coverage from Lingfield Park and Newcastle, featuring a total of 10 races on the all-weather surfaces. The feature race from Newcastle is the Burradon Stakes. With analysis from Luke Harvey and Adele Mulrennan, betting news from Matt Chapman, commentary from Mark Johnson and reports from Rishi Persad

programme.title: Kelly's Heroes (1970)
programme.desc: A rebellious American soldier fighting in occupied France learns from a captive German officer the whereabouts of a fortune in Nazi gold. Recruiting the aid of three fellow soldiers, he puts together a daring plan to penetrate enemy lines to get their hands on the bullion. Second World War adventure, starring Clint Eastwood, Telly Savalas, Donald Sutherland, Don Rickles and Harry Dean Stanton

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: Newly promoted Captain Horatio Hornblower sets out to make his mark on the world, and soon manages to capture his first enemy vessel - only to discover a peace treaty has been signed, leaving him down and out, with barely a penny to his name. Fate seems to smile on the ambitious seafarer though, when he discovers the villainous Bonaparte has reneged on the treaty. Drama based on the CS Forester novels, starring Ioan Gruffudd, Robert Lindsay, Paul McGann, Greg Wise, Lorcan Cranitch and Julia Sawalha

programme.title: On Her Majesty's Secret Service (1969)
programme.desc: While on leave, James Bond prevents a young woman - Teresa 'Tracy' Draco - from committing suicide. Her father is Marc-Ange Draco, the head of a powerful crime syndicate who is impressed by Bond and wants him to protect his daughter by marrying her. In exchange, he offers Bond information that will lead him to master criminal and arch-enemy Ernst Stavro Blofeld, who is intent on destroying world peace by means of a lethal virus unless he receives an international amnesty for his crimes. Spy adventure, starring George Lazenby in his only outing as 007, alongside Telly Savalas, Diana Rigg, Gabrielle Ferzetti and Bernard Lee

programme.desc: Includes headlines and weather

A confession from Malcolm about what he gets up to while Jude is at the bingo leaves her fuming, and Elisa's revelation about a celebrity crush leaves her boyfriend Alan speechless. The final hosts, Alan and Elisa, have dished out blunt feedback all week, so their guests could be out for revenge

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

With Daniela's budget of £100,000 and her mother Janet by her side to help, Jonnie Irwin lines up five options for her to choose between

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun

programme.title: Channel 4 News

programme.desc: Niles and Martin take pity on Frasier and individually set him up on dates with three women who they believe will sweep him off his feet, but unfortunately things do not go to plan. Comedy, with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

Art Club meets Liverpudlian artist Chila Kumari Singh Burman, whose recent installation transformed the front of Tate Britain into a celebration of bright lights and swirling colour. Grayson and Derren choose their favourite artworks from this week's submissions and some of the special guests from throughout the series return for a heart-warming finale

programme.title: Gogglebox

Despite his muscular appearance, he is a sensitive soul who loves musicals and Harry Potter, and his Asperger's leaves him unable to read what others are thinking, so mid-date he is forced to ask Emilia how he is doing. Meanwhile, 40-year-old hotelier Andy arrives at Vesuvius for his first ever date with a man, 37-year-old bouncer Joseph, and police officer Angie hooks up with car salesman Tom, who is determined to leave his stereotypical lad image behind

Unfortunately, their efforts to snare respectable women fall flat when wayward best friends Tatiana and Alice see an opportunity for a debauched free holiday and concoct a plan to deceive the siblings. Comedy, starring Zac Efron, Anna Kendrick, Adam Devine and Aubrey Plaza

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay gives his advice to Paul Bazzini, an award-winning chef from New York who now owns a restaurant in Ridgewood, New Jersey. Paul confesses he has lost his passion for food and is struggling to keep up with the business, a situation that seems evident to other members of staff, his wife and customers

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Trainee barrister Sasha hosts the second night in Manchester, where she hopes to impress her guests with a Chinese-Pakistani fusion menu. Meanwhile, fellow contestant Maria reveals more about her love of gothic culture, and Danny discusses his soon-to-be-written autobiography

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nurse Katherine hosts the third dinner party in Manchester, and she opts for a simple menu of a smoked salmon with horseradish cream starter, and a chorizo and chickpea main course. At the table, direct questioning and some extraordinary revelations cause some of the guests to feel uncomfortable

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barber Danny hosts the fourth night of the competition in Manchester, and decides on an evening of Bulgarian cuisine as a homage to his wife. His party ends with some Bulgarian language lessons that bemuse fellow diners Dom and Maria

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final night in Manchester and glamorous goth Maria is hoping to wow her guests with her twist on Asian cuisine. Some of the guests are feeling a little uneasy that the host will impart her love of vampire culture upon her menu, but the blood-free dishes even manage to impress daddy's girl Sasha. However, an avant-garde transgender dancer creates a stir, and at one point it seems possible that Maria has bitten off more than she can chew

programme.title: The £100k Drop
programme.desc: Best friends from Glasgow and a father and son from Birmingham start off with £100,000 and must avoid wrong answers or bundles of their cash will fall through trapdoors

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is caught in a battle of wills between Sheldon and Penny, while Leonard tries to reignite his long-distance relationship with Priya, who has moved back to India. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.desc: Leonard inadvertently gives the impression he is attracted to Amy when he accompanies her to a colleague's wedding. Meanwhile, Howard tries to persuade Bernadette they should live with his mother after getting married and suggests a trial run of the arrangement over the weekend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj feels upset about not being in a relationship, so Penny sets out to find a date and introduces him to a girl he can actually talk to. They hit it off, but when it becomes apparent he has been buying her expensive gifts, his friends suspect she is only interested in his wealth

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns hires a hard-working, conscientious new employee, who takes an instant dislike to the slobbish Homer and sets about trying to humiliate him. Meanwhile, Bart buys an abandoned factory for a dollar at a government auction and gives Milhouse the job of nightwatchman

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge force Bart to enrol in a military academy and Lisa unwisely follows him. Once in her own barracks she is snubbed by the other cadets - but receives unexpected help from Bart to tackle the assault course. Featuring the guest voice of Willem Dafoe

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Bart is knocked down by Mr Burns' car, Homer and lawyer Lionel Hutz see a chance to take advantage of Springfield's richest man by making a lucrative compensation claim

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer eats a poisonous fish and fears he has only 24 hours to live. As the minutes tick by, he embarks on a frantic race to put his affairs in order and accomplish everything he ever wanted to do but never did. With the guest voices of Larry King and George Takei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart drives Lisa to distraction on a school trip, tormenting her until she takes out a restraining order forbidding him to come within 20ft of her. Just to be on the safe side, she uses a pole to make sure he keeps his distance. Meanwhile, Grampa is hurt in an incident involving a garden gnome

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Selma realises her hopes of ever bearing a child are diminishing and flies to China to adopt a baby. Asked to fill in her husband's name on the application, she pretends to be married to Homer - but the company co-ordinator (guest star Lucy Liu) sees through the deception. Also featuring the voices of Robert Wagner and David Silverman

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: A dangerous pride of lions at Sibuya Game Reserve needs to be moved after killing and eating some poachers, and elephants and a meerkat take part in a unique experiment

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Swansea, married couple Leanne and Senol start things off with a feast of Turkish food, which hits the spot for fun-loving Paul and his partner Verity, though Paul's love of Hawaiian shirts doesn't go down well with Catrin and Josh, who don't like the hosts' meaty main course either. On day two Catrin and Josh attempt some Welsh fine dining, but the complicated dessert fails to live up to its billing. Finally, Paul and Verity get a turn to impress with their version of good pub grub

programme.title: Live Heineken Champions Cup Rugby Union
programme.desc: Wasps v Clermont-Auvergne (Kick-off 12.30pm). Lee McKenzie presents coverage of the last-16 match at the Ricoh Arena in Coventry. Wasps are two-time winners of this prestigious competition, while Clermont are desperate to lift the trophy having fallen at the last hurdle more than once, losing in three finals. A place in the quarter-finals against Munster or Toulouse awaits the winners. Commentary by Miles Harrison, Jamie Heaslip and Danielle Waterman, with analysis by Jack Willis and Chris Ashton

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at the Hillcroft in Torquay, where Martyn and Elaine Flint hope their lovingly decorated, adults-only B&B will prove a hit with their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to the Bear and Swan in Chew Magna in Somerset, where Sam Wilkins and Henry Russell hope to impress with the five-star rooms above their country pub

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Guesthouse East in Eastbourne, where Tony and Lisa Partridge hope to impress their guests with their family friendly B&B

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jorge Mesquita plays host at the Shirley B&B, Bournemouth, where he believes the guests will be impressed by his power showers and hopes a go-karting contest will help him win

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jorge Mesquita of the Shirley B&B is taken ill, so the remaining B&B'ers fight it out for the prized plaque as they meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Harry and Briony Anscombe, who have decided to move from London to Cornwall with their three young children and begin building work on an ambitious house, inspired by American modernist properties. With a budget of just £400,000, Harry opts to project manage himself, paying local builders by the hour, but his lack of experience in construction proves to be problematic

programme.title: Channel 4 News

programme.desc: Prince George makes a love match and marries the glamorous Princess Marina of Greece and Denmark, while Henry gives up the married Beryl Markham and also makes a suitable marriage. Edward, meanwhile, brings married American divorcee Wallis Simpson to George and Marina's pre-wedding party at Buckingham Palace, scandalising his parents. Not long after George V's Silver Jubilee celebrations, a unifying event for the nation, the King dies and Edward inherits the throne

programme.title: The Windsors: Inside the Royal Dynasty
programme.desc: This episode focuses on the early days of Elizabeth II's reign. The young queen takes her first steps as Queen, but finds herself torn between old tradition and those, like her husband, who want to modernise the monarchy

programme.title: Eye in the Sky (2015)

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: In one of the biggest engineering projects of the Middle Ages, Salisbury Cathedral was moved from a wind-blasted Iron Age hill fort to its current location - a feat accomplished in just 38 years, helping establish the Wiltshire city in the process. A place of both ancient tradition and home to one of the country's oldest choirs, Tony witnesses the ritual of inducting a new chorister and sees the oldest working clock in the world. The presenter also reflects on the cathedral's role in a clandestine operation that helped turn the tide of the Second World War

programme.desc: A teenager from a traditional Romani community is looking forward to college, unaware that her family has other plans. When she introduces her new boyfriend to her parents at her 18th birthday party, she is horrified to learn they have arranged a marriage for her, and desperately tries to escape being forced into wedlock. Thriller, starring Ana Golja and Rachel Wilson

programme.desc: TV chef Billie Blessings is dismayed when one of the owners of the popular grocery store she has been buying provisions from since childhood is found dead. Mystery drama, starring Holly Robinson Peete and Rick Fox

programme.title: Secrets of the Royal Train
programme.desc: The inside story of the trains used by the monarchy for more than 150 years, from its lavish past as the royal express of excess to the present Queen's mobile 'home from home'. The programme meets staff who have served on the train for many years, from the foreman who accidentally walked in on the Queen in her nightgown, to the mischievous 86-year-old signalman who encouraged Diana, Princess of Wales to play practical jokes on his friends

programme.title: World's Most Scenic River Journeys
programme.desc: Documentary series telling the stories of six epic river journeys via the characters who live and work on and around the water. It begins with a trip down the Niagara River, before arriving at the world-famous Niagara Falls. Bill Nighy narrates

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: A look at the little known drama of Winston Churchill's First World War. Aged 40, he became Britain's First Lord of the Admiralty, in charge of the largest naval force in the world. This edition also examines his ability to bounce back from the disaster of Gallipoli, and his experiences on the Western Front

programme.title: Britain's Favourite 80s Songs
programme.desc: A look at the biggest singles of 1984, the best pop videos, the artists who appeared in them, and the stories behind the songs. Cheryl Baker reveals how Tina Turner's What's Love Got to Do with It started off as a Bucks Fizz song. Plus, a look at Frankie Goes to Hollywood's controversial Relax, and the hits of Wham!. With contributions from Toyah Willcox, Paul Gambaccini, Carol Decker and Jenny Powell

programme.title: That's So
programme.desc: A look at the year that saw Arthur Scargill and Margaret Thatcher at loggerheads, the Brighton hotel bombing, Torvill and Dean win gold at the Winter Olympics with their famous Bolero routine, the death of comedian Eric Morecambe, and Virgin Atlantic Airways make its inaugural flight. Featuring hits by Band Aid, Black Lace, Cyndi Lauper, Sade and Frankie Goes to Hollywood

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. programme.title: Shock Docs
programme.desc: Documentary exploring some of Britain's most bizarre parent-child relationships, where the mums and dads will do anything to look better than their kids. Those featured include 39-year-old Georgina, who was once a frumpy mum but has now followed daughter Kayla by becoming the image of a Barbie doll, complete with fake boobs and lips. Forty-five-year-old Paul is constantly muscling in on the action with his 18-year-old bodybuilder son Kyle, and former glamour model Charmaine loves flaunting what she has, much to the embarrassment of 14-year-old Yasmin. But when she decides to go back to modelling, how will her daughter react?

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor and presenter visits Durham cathedral, one of Britain's first Unesco World Heritage sites and a leading tourist attraction. The cathedral is over 900 years old and built like a fortress. It is 218ft tall and when first constructed was the country's tallest building. The bishops at Durham were so powerful that they were given the title Prince-Bishop to reflect their huge wealth and influence. As well as exploring the Norman edifice, Tony meets a modern-day treasure hunter who has discovered hidden lost treasures from the cathedral in the River Wear

programme.title: Our Yorkshire Farm
programme.desc: Special episode exploring how the Owen children have grown over the past five years, and how their unusual childhood on the family's hill farm has shaped them. Previously unseen footage from past episodes shows Sid and Reuben bonding over a shared love of all things mechanical, and Clemmie growing from a curious toddler to an independent and fearless farmer

programme.title: Holidaying with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: Jane heads to New York and stays in the heart of Manhattan - Times Square. She has a caricature done in Central Park, enjoys a personal shopping experience, and has a helicopter ride over the city. Joining her to explore is former Olympic athlete Greg Rutherford, along with his wife Susie and two children. They stay in a 5-Star hotel on the shores of Lake Annecy in the French Alps. Plus, Angellica Bell enjoys a staycation weekend in Devon, residing in a quirky beach hut in Babbacombe Bay

programme.title: Fergie & Andrew: The Duke & Duchess of Disaster
programme.desc: Documentary examining the scandals that have surrounded Prince Andrew and Sarah Ferguson since their marriage in 1986 and subsequent divorce. The programme examines the succession of PR gaffes and undercover tabloid stings that followed in the Duchess of York's wake once she was no longer part of the royal family, as well as looking into the prince's friendship with convicted paedophile Jeffrey Epstein

programme.title: Paul Burrell: Royal Service, Scandal & Celebrity
programme.desc: The story of Princess Diana's former butler, charting his rise and the events of 2002, when he stood trial and was cleared of stealing items belonging to the Princess of Wales. Interviews with those who know Burrell best, including his brother and his ghost writer - as well as royal journalists and insiders - reveal how he went from footman to household name

programme.title: Live Boxing
programme.desc: Jamel Herring v Carl Frampton. All the action from the bout for the WBO World Super Featherweight title at Caesars Palace Dubai in the United Arab Emirates. Herring won this title in 2019 when he outpointed Masayuki Ito and has since defended it against Lamont Roach and Jonathan Oquendo. However, Frampton represents arguably his toughest test to date, and the Northern Irishman will be hoping to become a three-weight world champion, having won titles at super bantamweight and featherweight

programme.title: Creed (2015)
programme.desc: The son of a heavyweight boxer who died in the ring seeks to follow in the footsteps of the father he never knew. He goes in search of his father's old rival-turned-best friend Rocky Balboa, who agrees to train the young fighter for a shot at the title - but the ageing champ is facing challenges of his own. Boxing drama, starring Michael B Jordan, with Sylvester Stallone reprising his role from the Rocky movies

programme.title: Baby Boom (1987)
programme.desc: A successful New York consultant is made the guardian of her dead cousin's baby daughter. At first she plans to put the child up for adoption, but finds herself unable to go through with it and reluctantly takes on the role of mother - a decision that throws her personal and professional lives into turmoil. Comedy, starring Diane Keaton, Harold Ramis, Sam Shepard and Sam Wanamaker

programme.title: Deep Impact (1998)
programme.desc: A TV reporter investigating a presidential misdemeanour stumbles on evidence that a comet is on a collision course with Earth, threatening the future of the human race. Meanwhile, an astronaut prepares to lead his crew on a do-or-die mission to intercept the danger. Sci-fi drama, starring Robert Duvall, Tea Leoni, Morgan Freeman and Elijah Wood

programme.title: The League of Extraordinary Gentlemen (2003)
programme.desc: Fearless hunter Allan Quatermain teams up with a host of other characters from Victorian literature - including Captain Nemo, the Invisible Man, Tom Sawyer and Dr Jekyll - to put a stop to the nefarious Fantom's evil plot to bring about a world war. Fantasy adventure, based on Alan Moore's comic-book series, starring Sean Connery in his final screen role, Shane West, Stuart Townsend, Richard Roxburgh, Peta Wilson and Tony Curran

programme.title: The Nice Guys (2016)
programme.desc: A private detective investigates the murder of a porn star in 1970s Los Angeles, only to run into a hired thug employed to scare him off. However, the mysterious disappearance of a woman connected to the case forces the unlikely duo to work together, leading them to uncover a government conspiracy. Crime comedy, starring Russell Crowe and Ryan Gosling

programme.title: Four Lions (2010)
programme.desc: Disillusioned British Muslim Omar decides to form a terrorist cell, but the only recruits he can find are his dim-witted friend, an angry and bitter white convert and a timid bomb-maker. The group's incompetent attempts to strike a blow against Western society culminate in a scheme to attack the London marathon. Chris Morris' satirical comedy, with Riz Ahmed and Kayvan Novak

programme.title: Zoolander 2 (2016)
programme.desc: Dim-witted supermodels Derek Zoolander and Hansel McDonald must step back into the spotlight and save the day when a maniacal villain starts murdering some of the world's most beautiful pop stars. Comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller and Owen Wilson, with Penelope Cruz, Will Ferrell and Kristen Wiig

programme.title: Two by Two (2015)
programme.desc: Two strange creatures and their children are barred from getting on board Noah's Ark, but manage to sneak in. When the kids fall overboard, they face a struggle for survival as the flood waters rise, while their distraught parents must work together to rescue them. Animated adventure, with the voices of Tara Flynn and Dermot Magennis

programme.title: Cutthroat Island (1995)
programme.desc: A tough female pirate enlists the help of an educated slave in finding the three parts of a map leading to buried treasure. However, one of the pieces is in the hands of her cruel uncle, and she also has to find the loot before her crew mutinies or the British Navy catches up with her. Swashbuckling adventure, starring Geena Davis, Matthew Modine, Frank Langella and Maury Chaykin

programme.title: The Core (2003)
programme.desc: A chain of bizarre and deadly incidents in several countries leads scientists to the conclusion that the Earth's core has stopped spinning. As chaos erupts around the world, experts hatch a plan to halt the destruction and save the human race - but it involves venturing deep below the planet's surface to detonate a nuclear bomb. Sci-fi thriller, starring Aaron Eckhart, Hilary Swank, Stanley Tucci and DJ Qualls

programme.title: Film4 Interview Programmes
programme.desc: Stars and directors talk about the experience of making movies in this compendium of personal and practical reflections

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight (2017)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots and their human allies face a confrontation with their original creator, who has brainwashed their leader and intends to save her own home planet by destroying Earth. To save the human race they must recover an ancient artefact from Arthurian legend - but their mission is threatened by old enemies as they uncover a terrible secret about the history of the world. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg, Anthony Hopkins, Gemma Chan, Stanley Tucci and John Turturro

programme.title: Big Game (2014)
programme.desc: The US president's plane is shot down over Finland. The head of state is left stranded in the wilderness being pursued by the terrorists responsible, but finds an unlikely ally in a teenage hunter, whose skills with a bow and arrow prove valuable. Action adventure, starring Samuel L Jackson, Onni Tommila and Ray Stevenson

programme.title: Overlord (2018)
programme.desc: In 1944, a group of American soldiers land in an occupied French hamlet after their plane is destroyed by enemy fire. Their mission is to take out a heavily fortified Nazi radio tower hours before D-Day. However, they stumble across a mysterious Nazi lab where their bloodthirsty enemies are waiting for them. Action thriller from producer JJ Abrams, starring Jovan Adepo, Wyatt Russell and Mathilde Ollivier

programme.title: The Witch (2018)
programme.desc: A young girl escapes from a shadowy facility in the middle of nowhere, and is found bloody and unconscious by an elderly couple. She can't remember a thing, not even her name - who is she and what happened to her? Supernatural action thriller, starring Da-mi Kim. In English and Korean with English subtitles

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul (2017)
programme.desc: Youngster Greg Heffley hatches a plot to re-route a family road trip towards a videogame convention. Comedy sequel, starring Jason Drucker, Alicia Silverstone and Tom Everett Scott

programme.title: Shrek the Third (2007)
programme.desc: The bad-tempered ogre finds himself in the unwelcome position of being next in line for the throne. Preferring to stay at home in the swamps, he sets out on a quest to find the rightful heir - a rebellious teenager named Artie - and persuade him to face up to his responsibilities as the future king. Meanwhile, the ambitious Prince Charming sees his chance to take the throne. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Eddie Murphy, Antonio Banderas and Rupert Everett

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted (2012)
programme.desc: The escaped zoo animals continue their quest to get back to their New York home. Having made it to Monte Carlo, they join a circus on a European tour as a means of travelling undetected - but an animal control agent is in hot pursuit. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ben Stiller, Chris Rock, David Schwimmer and Jada Pinkett Smith

programme.title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (1992)
programme.desc: Hapless youngster Kevin somehow manages to catch the wrong plane and finds himself heading for New York, while his family jets off to Florida. Having got his hands on his father's credit card, he is enjoying the good life staying in a luxury hotel - until he bumps into two familiar burglars with an axe to grind. Comedy sequel, starring Macaulay Culkin, Joe Pesci, Daniel Stern, Brenda Fricker and Tim Curry

programme.title: Mrs Doubtfire (1993)
programme.desc: A struggling actor's ambitious, no-nonsense wife throws him out and demands a divorce. Desperate to spend time with his children, he puts his talents to good use by donning drag and posing as a British housekeeper to get a job looking after them. Comedy, starring Robin Williams, Sally Field, Pierce Brosnan, Harvey Fierstein and Mara Wilson

programme.title: The Hitman's Bodyguard (2017)
programme.desc: A disgraced bodyguard is hired to protect a hitman about to testify against the tyrannical president of Belarus at the International Criminal Court in exchange for the release of his wife from prison. Comedy action thriller, starring Ryan Reynolds, Samuel L Jackson, Gary Oldman and Salma Hayek

programme.title: Return of the Living Dead (1984)
programme.desc: A gang of punks battles flesh-eating undead monsters while trapped in a medical supplies warehouse. Horror comedy, starring Clu Gulager, Beverly Randolph and James Karen

programme.title: Train to Busan (2016)
programme.desc: Hedge-fund manager Seok-woo sets off on a train journey with his small daughter, but as their train is about to leave the station a very sick passenger stumbles aboard - affected by a chemical spill that turns creatures and people into zombies. The virus spreads fast from carriage to carriage, and Seok-woo must join with other unaffected passengers and fight to save his own life and that of his child. South Korean horror, starring Yoo Gong and Yu-mi Jung. In Korean and Hawaiian

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Babylon in New York, where the peace of Long Island is regularly shattered by the volatile Pellegrino family, proprietors of Peter's Italian Restaurant. Gordon finds owner Tina's work to save the eatery from oblivion is frequently ruined by the behaviour of her brother, a tyrannical front-of-house manager whose violent temper constantly undermines staff morale

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Rainbow struggles to adjust when she returns to work at the end of her maternity leave and faces the combined challenges of domestic and professional life. Meanwhile, Ruby gives the twins a 'workaround' plan to get out of doing their homework

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: When Dre's sister Rhonda comes to town, Ruby has a talk with both of her children about their inheritance. Rainbow's sister Santamonica also pays a visit and hires Andre Jr to work as her assistant

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben and Riley try to make the difficult transition from friends to being a couple, which leads to an embarrassing moment for Riley. Elsewhere, Tucker helps Danny to get over his failed relationship. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley begins to wonder whether Ben owes it to himself to give family life with Angela and baby Emma a chance, while Bonnie tries to keep her age a secret when she dates a much younger man. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau, Chelsea Kane and Derek Theler

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon wins a grant to pay for a summer expedition to the North Pole, and invites his friends to join him. However, the gang's imminent departure causes Leonard and Penny to reconsider their feelings for each other. Johnny Gale and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon returns to Texas in disgrace when he discovers his friends tampered with the Arctic expedition data after growing tired of his quest for a scientific breakthrough. Elsewhere, Leonard becomes frustrated as constant interruptions hamper his attempts to woo Penny

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam asks his father for money to film his own action movie. Erica and Beverly go clothes shopping, and Erica uses Beverly's sweaters to create her own version of a popular outfit. Comedy, starring Sean Giambrone, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam gets between Murray and Marvin when they go without him to the Philadelphia Thanksgiving Day parade to see KITT from TV show Knight Rider. Beverly invites Lainey and Bill to Thanksgiving dinner so that Barry won't split his time between two households, but her plans soon go awry. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta takes part in an undercover FBI operation that ends in a mass arrest. But when one of the mobsters escapes he enlists Boyle's help in tracking him down. Captain Holt tests the squad's patience with practice drills in which Sgt Jeffords plays different roles, while Gina pleads with Boyle to keep a secret. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt is taken by surprise when his long-time nemesis, Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch (guest star Kyra Sedgwick), arrives to carry out an inspection of his precinct. Peralta and Jeffords test the boundaries between 'work friendship' and 'real friendship' while they investigate a stabbing at a trendy milk bar. Boyle searches for a guest to take to his ex-wife's engagement party - will Diaz come to the rescue?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon uses his holidays to help Amy in her biology lab, but moans about the menial jobs he is given - until she asks him to dissect a brain. Penny grows curious about Leonard's attitude to marriage when Bernadette asks Howard to sign a pre-nuptial agreement

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard devise a contest to decide whether Sheldon or Kripke should get Professor Rothman's vacant corner office. Meanwhile, Penny receives the gift of a painting from Amy to celebrate their friendship, but discreetly tries to dispose of it with help from Bernadette

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny feels threatened when a sexy actress, who has landed a role in TV series CSI, moves into the apartment building, and gradually begins to sense that her friends are being manipulated by the new arrival. Comedy, starring Kaley Cuoco, Valerie Azlynn, Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Inspired by the Karate Kid films, Adam and the other Adam Goldberg decide to face off in a karate match to settle their long-running feud once and for all. Later, Barry and Adam ask Uncle Marvin for some martial arts training - but the only thing they learn is how to do his cleaning

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After Barry starts checking out the best medical schools, Lainey reveals she has won a scholarship to art college. Erica and Adam start to suspect that Murray loves the family dog Lucky more than them

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Boyle go on an eight-day stakeout, which puts a strain on their friendship. Meanwhile, Jeffords uses Santiago and Gina for inspiration when he writes a book about his daughters, and Captain Holt's nephew visits Brooklyn and makes an instant impression on Diaz. Comedy, guest starring Kyra Sedgwick and Nick Cannon

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The team visits Boyle's beach house on a detectives-only getaway, but Peralta ruins the fun by inviting Captain Holt along. The host helps Diaz to send romantic texts to her new boyfriend Marcus, while Gina amuses herself by trying to get Santiago drunk. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples have dinner with their loved ones. Charlene has to survive dinner with her meddling mother-in-law, and things are not improving for troubled couple Gab and Nasser

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny tells the girls she is unsure about her relationship with Leonard and is considering breaking up with him, but when Sheldon finds out, he tries his best to change her mind. Meanwhile, on the International Space Station, Howard is being bullied by the other astronauts. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon hires an attractive female assistant, but when she becomes interested in Leonard, Penny decides to mark her territory by sleeping with him. Meanwhile, Howard starts to lose his mind when his return from space is delayed another week. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: The crew must fend off demanding charter guests to keep Captain Sandy at bay after receiving complaints, and an excursion to Capri allows Joao and Kasey to get to know each other

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny struggles with Leonard's confession that he kissed another woman when he was away on his North Sea research expedition. After driving all the way to Las Vegas, she must now decide whether she wants to go through with the wedding. Back home, Sheldon doesn't know how to act after Amy tells him she wants them to take a relationship break

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Parents David and Nina Bean are struggling to balance their complicated work schedules and four kids, so Jo Frost comes to the assistance of the Chicago-based family

programme.title: 24 Hour Baby Hospital
programme.desc: Teenagers Milaois and James await laser eye surgery for their daughter, while Polish couple Julia and Krystian arrive at the delivery suite to have their first child, believing they are already in contention for the world's longest labour

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy and Sheldon start a gossip experiment to see how quickly rumours spread among the gang, while Howard tells his friends he is planning to propose to Bernadette - not realising Raj is wrestling with his own feelings for her. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Mayim Bialik and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is infuriated when Priya uses her legal knowledge to find a loophole in the room-mate agreement - but his spirits are lifted by a night on the town with Amy, Penny and Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Nanny Jo, who has grown up knowing she is bisexual but has only ever had relationships with men, embarks on her first date with a woman. Will 4ft 7 personal trainer Naomi prove to be the one? Dean's dream of dating a redhead looks set to become true when he meets flame-haired estate agent Kate, while 49-year-old Thomas - whose last date ended in heartbreak - is hoping it will be second time lucky when he sits down with sexual health nurse Colin

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: After the mysterious death of one of the lunch ladies at school, Summer becomes terrified by the possibility of a vampire attack. Rick encourages Beth and Jerry to sort out the problems in their relationship by undergoing off-planet therapy

programme.title: Robot Chicken
programme.desc: The Robot Chicken writers demonstrate what would happen if Darth Vader learned to apologise, and Bugs Bunny takes his cross-dressing habit to 'the next level'

programme.title: Mr Pickles: Momma Named Me Sheriff
programme.desc: When Sheriff realises that an addiction to his Momma's pudding is allowing her to control him, he decides to better his relationship with her, by kicking his pudding habit

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Reviewed shows include The Button, The Queen's Birthday Party, Britain's Got Talent, University Challenge, This Morning, The Real Camilla: HRH The Duchess of Cornwall, and Top of the Shop. First aired in April 2018

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Parents David and Nina Bean are struggling to balance their complicated work schedules and four kids, so Jo Frost comes to the assistance of the Chicago-based family

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: In the season finale, David gets stressed about the weather on his wedding day. Thankfully, his family are on hand to make everything right

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Howard stake their most coveted comic books on a bet over the species of a cricket, while Leonard and Penny struggle to recover from an awkward first night together. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.desc: The chef tries to reverse the fortunes of the Mixing Bowl diner in Bellmore, New York, where a talented cook's work is being undone by the manager's marketing plans - putting the finances in dire straits
